---
title: "The 4/20 Effect: Fatal Vehicle Crashes and the Annual Cannabis Holiday"
author: "Daniel Dawit, Pranav Kannan, Sid Mehrok, Satvik Kannekanti"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 12pt
    number-sections: true
    toc: false
    fig-pos: "H"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
